bids.reasoning: The opponent opened with the worst possible offer for me (all valueE, giving me 0.2 utility across all issues) and paired it with an aggressive "take it or leave it" message - classic cheap talk that I should ignore. At t=0.00, there's no time pressure at all, so I should counter with my ideal bid (all valueA) to maximize my utility (1.0) and anchor high. Their bluster doesn't change the math.

I'll maintain my top bid (all valueA = utility 1.0) since there's no reason to concede yet. The opponent's aggressive rhetoric is cheap talk contradicted by their lopsided offer, so I'll hold firm.
